triggers.description: When you planeswalk to CARDNAME and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a 2/2 blue Shapeshifter creature token with changeling. (It is every creature type.)
When you planeswalk to CARDNAME and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a 2/2 blue Shapeshifter creature token with changeling. (It is every creature type.)
Whenever chaos ensues, choose a creature type. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control of that type.
